overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a historic New Orleans-style city street at night, entering a cemetery with above-ground stone mausoleums. The scene transitions from a wet cobblestone street past a saloon building into an atmospheric cemetery illuminated by warm gas lamps, with light rain beginning to fall as the character explores deeper among the tombs.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic city street with saloon building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone street toward the illuminated cemetery entrance, passing a two-story saloon building with warm lantern light

entered.detail: two-story historic building with illuminated signage and wooden balcony
low brick wall with potted plants and lantern posts
large stone archway entrance to the cemetery with wrought iron gates
tall cast-iron gas lamps illuminating the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wet cobblestone street at night, passing a historic saloon building with warm lighting. The street is lined with brick walls and planters on the left, while the cemetery gate arch looms ahead in the distance, illuminated by gas lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: cemetery entrance passage with stone archway

events.description: character pushes open wrought iron gates and enters the covered stone archway tunnel
light rain begins to fall, creating visible streaks in the warm lamplight

agents.ego_description: pushing through the heavy wrought iron gates and walking through the stone passage into the cemetery interior

entered.detail: ornate black iron gates that swing open to allow entry
covered passageway with stone walls and ceiling lantern
stone mausoleums and crypts lining the cemetery paths
large circular mausoleum with columns and domed roof at the cemetery center

segments.scene_description: The character pushes through the wrought iron gates into a stone archway tunnel, transitioning from the street into the cemetery. Emerging from the passage, rows of above-ground stone tombs become visible, with a large circular mausoleum standing prominently in the center distance. Light rain begins to fall as the character walks deeper into the grounds.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense historic cemetery with winding paths between mausoleums

events.description: passing the central rotunda and entering narrower winding paths between densely packed tombs

agents.ego_description: navigating the winding cobblestone paths between rows of stone mausoleums while light rain continues to fall

entered.detail: closely packed above-ground crypts and tombs lining both sides of the narrow path
small candles and lanterns placed at the base of tombstones
overhanging tree branches creating a canopy over the cemetery paths

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the cemetery, the character passes the central rotunda and enters narrower winding paths densely packed with stone mausoleums on both sides. Small ground lanterns flicker at the base of tombs, and tree branches create a canopy overhead as the light rain continues to fall on the cobblestone paths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wet, historic city street into the atmospheric depths of a rain-swept cemetery. It begins by tracking along a cobblestone road past a warmly lit saloon and brick walls, moving steadily toward a distant gate arch illuminated by gas lamps. As the character pushes through the wrought iron gates and emerges from a stone archway tunnel, the open street gives way to rows of above-ground stone tombs and a prominent central circular mausoleum under a light rain. The scene then shifts into narrower, winding paths densely packed with mausoleums, where flickering ground lanterns light the way. Finally, the camera moves deeper into the grounds as tree branches form a dark canopy overhead, with rain continuing to fall on the cobblestone paths.
